hypothesis: Incorporating 3D protein-pocket-derived pharmacophore constraints into the FREED++ reward combined with MAP4-based novelty penalties will produce generated molecules whose mean docking score against the alpha-estrogen receptor is at least 1.0 kcal/mol more favorable (more negative) than the MAP4+Cosine setup while maintaining a mean Tanimoto structural similarity ≤ 0.36 and mean QED ≥ 0.5.
